body.purpose: Primary text for paragraphs and labels.

mono.purpose: Code, technical labels, and data fields.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle elevation for headers and meta bars.

shadows.name: elevation-medium
shadows.purpose: Standard elevation for cards, containers, and panels.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Easing for expand/collapse and reveal animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for confirming and submitting.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: {colors.amber}; color: {colors.ink}; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 1rem 3rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: {colors.amber-2}; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid {colors.amber}; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button for less prominent actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background-color: transparent; color: {colors.ink}; border: 1px solid {colors.amber}; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: {colors.amber-glow}; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid {colors.amber}; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input for forms and filters.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; max-width: 400px; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid {colors.ink-4}; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 1rem; background-color: transparent; color: {colors.ink}; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: {colors.amber}; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px {colors.amber-glow}; outline: none; } .ds-input:disabled { background-color: {colors.ink-4}; color: {colors.ink-2}; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Device Node Fan
components.description: Represents a fan device, showing on/off state with animated blades.
components.css: .ds-device-node { width: 3rem; height: 3rem; position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-fan-off { background-color: {colors.ink-4}; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-fan-on { background-color: {colors.amber}; } .ds-fan-blades { width: 100%; height: 100%; background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 30 30"><path fill="%23fff" d="M15 15 C 15 6, 10 4, 7 8 C 10 11, 13 13, 15 15 Z" fill-opacity="0.2"/><path fill="%23fff" d="M15 15 C 24 15, 26 10, 22 7 C 19 10, 17 13, 15 15 Z" fill-opacity="0.2"/><path fill="%23fff" d="M15 15 C 15 24, 20 26, 23 22 C 20 19, 17 17, 15 15 Z" fill-opacity="0.2"/><path fill="%23fff" d="M15 15 C 6 15, 4 20, 8 23 C 11 20, 13 17, 15 15 Z" fill-opacity="0.2"/><circle cx="15" cy="15" r="2.5" fill="%23fff"/></svg>'); } .ds-fan-on .ds-fan-blades { animation: fan-spin 1.6s linear infinite; } @keyframes fan-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-fan-on .ds-fan-blades { animation-duration: 5s; } }

components.name: Device Node Light
components.description: Represents a light device, showing on/off state with glow effect.
components.css: .ds-device-node { width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; position: relative; border-radius: 50%; } .ds-light-off { background-color: {colors.ink-4}; } .ds-light-on { background-color: {colors.amber}; box-shadow: 0 0 15px 5px {colors.amber-glow}; } .ds-light-on::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at center, transparent 0%, {colors.amber-glow} 70%); animation: light-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes light-pulse { from { box-shadow: 0 0 10px 3px {colors.amber-glow}; } to { box-shadow: 0 0 20px 7px {colors.amber-glow}; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-light-on::after { animation-duration: 6s; } }

narrative.overview: Friendly and approachable with a touch of industrial clarity. Avoids cold clinical feels and excessive charts.
keyCharacteristics: Friendly and approachable with a touch of industrial clarity
Avoids cold clinical feels and excessive charts
Emphasizes visual feedback over raw data
Uses warm amber accents to convey state and activity

rules.name: The Single Sans Rule
rules.body: The body and label fonts share the same sans-serif family (Plus Jakarta Sans) to ensure visual harmony and readability across the interface, reserving the display font for moments that need emphasis.

rules.name: The Amber Glow Rule
rules.body: The primary accent color (Amber Glow) is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or to define surface hierarchy, ensuring that motion and depth serve a functional purpose.

dos: Do use Amber Glow for primary actions and state indicators, keeping its usage to ≤10% of the screen to maintain visual significance.
Do use Surface and Surface-2 for card and container backgrounds to create subtle elevation without relying solely on shadows.
Do use the Bebas Neue display font for large metrics and the brand mark to add character and immediate visual impact.
Do use glowing effects (Amber Glow rgba) for lights when on and spinning animations for fans to convey state intuitively.
Do ensure all interactive components have clear hover, focus, active, and disabled states, using Amber Glow and Rose for feedback.
donts: Don't use cold, clinical, hospital-like dashboards with excessive charts and graphs; avoid blue-heavy palettes and sterile layouts.
Don't use overly playful or toy-like interfaces; avoid bright, saturated colors that undermine the professional context.
Don't reinvent standard affordances (e.g., custom scrollbars or non-standard modals); use native button and input behaviors.
Don't use decorative motion that doesn't convey state; all animations should reflect device status or user interaction.
Don't use text with insufficient contrast; always verify that text meets WCAG 2.1 AA against its background (e.g., Ink on Base: 12.6:1, Ink-2 on Surface: 8.3:1).
